author: y4rr
content: BatchNorm2d added to BasicBlock and Bottleneck in resnet.rs. test_bottleneck_parameter_count updated to 70400 (3 conv + 3 BN, planes=64 in/out=256). Fixture resnet18_num_classes_10_param_count=11,181,642 now matches actual. resnet18_num_parameters_matches_reference passes clean — cascade_skip branch no longer reached.
